title: Add accessibility improvements

requirements.text: Add proper ARIA labels to all interactive elements including buttons, form inputs, dialogs, and navigation links throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: All buttons have descriptive aria-label attributes
Form inputs have associated labels or aria-label attributes
Dialog components have aria-labelledby and aria-describedby attributes
Navigation menu items have descriptive labels

requirements.text: Ensure proper keyboard navigation support across all pages including Dashboard, Patients, Staff, Finance, Reports, Backup, Attendance, and Sessions pages with focus management
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements are reachable via Tab key
Focus is trapped within modal dialogs
Escape key closes dialogs and dropdowns
Visual focus indicators are clearly visible

requirements.text: Add semantic HTML structure with proper heading hierarchy (h1, h2, h3) across all pages and ensure landmark regions (header, nav, main, footer) are properly defined
acceptanceCriteria: Each page has a single h1 element
Heading levels follow logical hierarchy without skipping levels
Header, navigation, main content, and footer use semantic HTML5 elements
Lists use proper ul/ol and li elements

requirements.text: Improve color contrast ratios to meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) across all text and interactive elements in both light and dark modes
acceptanceCriteria: All text meets minimum contrast ratios
Button text is clearly readable against background colors
Error messages and alerts have sufficient contrast
Both light and dark themes meet contrast requirements

requirements.text: Add screen reader announcements for dynamic content updates including successful operations, errors, loading states, and data changes using ARIA live regions
acceptanceCriteria: Success messages are announced to screen readers
Error messages are announced with appropriate urgency
Loading states provide feedback to screen readers
Data table updates are communicated

requirements.text: Ensure all form validation errors are accessible with clear error messages associated with their respective form fields using aria-describedby or aria-invalid attributes
acceptanceCriteria: Required fields are marked with aria-required
Invalid fields have aria-invalid='true'
Error messages are linked to inputs via aria-describedby
Error messages are announced when validation fails

requirements.text: Add skip navigation link at the top of the page to allow keyboard users to bypass repetitive navigation and jump directly to main content
acceptanceCriteria: Skip link appears on keyboard focus
Skip link jumps to main content area
Skip link is visually hidden until focused
Skip link works consistently across all pages

constraints: Maintain existing functionality while adding accessibility improvements
Do not modify backend main.mo file
Preserve current design and layout while improving accessibility
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond accessibility improvements
